emails.subject: Last day Nymex trading
emails.body: Last day Nymex trading Mark Trading would like to commence transacting Last day Nymex vs. Physical delivery. So far each request is for an established Location. Attached please find an example of one such transaction. Please review and offer aproval/comments. Jennifer, I am certain that we have already mapped this but if you could please double check. Index: NYMEX L1 Abb: L1 Descr: The Index shall be the settlement price for the last scheduled Trading Day of the NYMEX Henry Hub Natural Gas Futures Contract, modified by the price submitted by the Counterparty on the website, for the applicable Determination Period. Dale 3-9746

emails.subject: Re: Last day Nymex trading
emails.body: Re: Last day Nymex trading My only concern is that it looks like we are modifying the NYMEX price twice once in the second sentence and then again in th definition of Index. Dale Neuner on 02/22/2000 11:35:14 AM
